title: Luke and Lucy: The Texas Rangers

sources.title: Luke And Lucy Texas Rangers 2010 Dvdrip Xvid
sources.description: Luke and Lucy, two inseparable friends, have to help out the Texas Rangers to prevent Jim Parasite from taking over the world.

metadata.Plot: Dark City, Texas: the evil and mysterious Jim Parasite terrorizes the city and is plotting to become the biggest and most powerful man in the world. He captures the Texas Rangers, but one of them manages to escape and calls upon Luke and Lucy for help.
metadata.Writer: Guy Mortier, Dirk Nielandt, Willy Vandersteen
metadata.Actors: Carlos Alayeto, Guilherme Apollonio, Daniël Boissevain
